Home › Orange County › Dr. Phillips › Nut-Aware Restaurants

Nut-Aware Restaurants in Dr. Phillips

Most of the restaurants with nut-aware options in Dr. Phillips grade well: 4 of 6 hold an A, led by ROCCO'S TACOS & TEQUILA BAR at 99/100. Every listing below carries its latest Florida health grade.

6 nut-aware restaurants

  • A 99 R
    ROCCO'S TACOS & TEQUILA BAR Mexican ★ 4.5 (14963) Orlando · Orange County VeganVeg +4 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 97 C
    COLD STONE CREAMERY Other ★ 4.4 (846) Orlando · Orange County Nut-aware Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 97 H
    HOT N JUICY CRAWFISH Seafood ★ 4.1 (2241) Orlando · Orange County GFDF +4 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 93 C
    COOPER'S HAWK WINERY & RESTAURANT American ★ 4.5 (3749) Orlando · Orange County VegGF +5 more Inspected May 2026
  • C 74 N
    NEW PUNJAB INDIAN RESTAURANT Indian ★ 4.2 (1104) Orlando · Orange County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected Jun 2026
  • D 65 O
    OUTBACK STEAKHOUSE American ★ 4.3 (6511) Orlando · Orange County GFDF +4 more Inspected Jan 2026
